message:
test(frankenterm-core): add scroll region, erase, and boundary fixtures + MouseEvent match arms

Add 6 VT conformance fixtures:
- EL 2 with current bg color
- IL/DL within scroll region content shift verification
- CBT from middle of line
- Multiple combined SGR params
- CUP explicit (1,1)

Fix non-exhaustive match for Action::MouseEvent in conformance_fixtures.rs,
proptest_invariants.rs, differential_terminal.rs, differential_extras_reference.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "cup_explicit_1_1",
+  "description": "CUP with explicit row=1 col=1 moves cursor to (0,0)",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    5
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b353b3548464f4f1b5b313b314858",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 4,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "F"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 4,
+        "col": 5,
+        "char": "O"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 4,
+        "col": 6,
+        "char": "O"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+{
+  "name": "delete_line_shifts_content",
+  "description": "DL within scroll region shifts lines up, blank at bottom of region",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    5
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b313b3148411b5b323b3148421b5b333b3148431b5b343b3148441b5b353b3148451b5b323b34721b5b333b31481b5b314d",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 2,
+      "col": 0
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 2,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "D"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 3,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 4,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "E"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+{
+  "name": "insert_line_shifts_content",
+  "description": "IL within scroll region shifts lines down, losing bottom line",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    5
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b313b3148411b5b323b3148421b5b333b3148431b5b343b3148441b5b353b3148451b5b323b34721b5b333b31481b5b314c",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 2,
+      "col": 0
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 2,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 3,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "C"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 4,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "E"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "cbt_from_middle",
+  "description": "CBT moves cursor backward to previous tab stop",
+  "initial_size": [
+    20,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b313243581b5b5a59",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 9
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 8,
+        "char": "Y"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 12,
+        "char": "X"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
